label: three_stage/BuildSystem/trial_00/repeat_02
governance_notes: Parent global vars 'builds' (read_write) and 'artifacts' (read_write) are fully covered: TriggerBuild covers builds read_write and artifacts write; CheckBuildStatus covers builds read; ListBuildHistory covers builds read; CancelBuild covers builds read_write. Artifacts read is not needed by any child as no child reads artifacts; parent's read requirement on artifacts is satisfied by the parent itself or external consumers, but per conservation rule, the parent's read_write on artifacts is partia
